title.rationale: Identifies the core themes and research focus of the paper.

source_link.rationale: Provide the online access link for the paper.

introduction.rationale: Overview of the core issues and motivations of the research

core_problem.rationale: Document the main limitations of existing reward methods.

research_motivation.rationale: Extract the reasons and objectives for proposing new methods.

methods.rationale: Technical implementation of the RLCF method

checklist_extraction_methods.rationale: Extract technical details of two checklist generation methods.

direct_method.rationale: 记录通过提示语言模型提取检查表的方法

candidate_method.rationale: 记录通过生成不同质量响应构建检查表的方法

rlcf_principle.rationale: Core mechanism of reinforcement learning from checklist feedback

evaluation_mechanism.rationale: Collaborative scoring method for AI adjudicators and verification programs.

experiments.rationale: Performance of recording methods in benchmarking.

test_datasets.rationale: Record the benchmark dataset used in the experiment.

performance_improvements.rationale: Extract specific improvements across various datasets

checklist_quality_comparison.rationale: Document the differences in effectiveness among various checklist generation methods.

conclusions.rationale: Summarize the limitations of the research and future directions.

limitations.rationale: Current limitations of the recording method
